headline: Gap's Positive Comps Streak: Near-Term Strength or Peak Cycle?
summary: GAP's comps streak hits eight quarters, but uneven segment performance and macro pressures raise questions on how long the retailer can sustain its momentum.

raw.headline: Gap's Positive Comps Streak: Near-Term Strength or Peak Cycle?
raw.summary: GAP's comps streak hits eight quarters, but uneven segment performance and macro pressures raise questions on how long the retailer can sustain its momentum.

headline: Home Depot Builds Pro Loyalty With New AI & Project Management Tools
summary: HD rolls out AI tools and a unified Pro platform to streamline workflows, boost loyalty and deepen engagement with contractors.

headline: FIVE Stock Up 7% After Q4 Earnings Top Estimates, Comps Rise Y/Y
summary: Five Below jumps 7.3% after Q4 beats as sales rise 24% and comps climb 15.4%, driven by strong traffic, merchandising gains and cost discipline.

raw.headline: FIVE Stock Up 7% After Q4 Earnings Top Estimates, Comps Rise Y/Y
